name: Excel Spreadsheet Processor
description: Comprehensive spreadsheet creation, editing, and analysis powered by Anthropic's production document skills. Supports formula authoring, data visualization, multi-sheet workbooks, and data import/export. This skill underlies Claude's native spreadsheet capabilities on claude.ai.

findings_summary.notes: Official Anthropic skill from anthropics/skills repository. Source-available (not open source) — this is one of Anthropic's production document skills powering Claude's file creation features. Verified present at skills/xlsx/ in the repo tree.
